textPlain: > TL;DR: Glide is a Firefox fork with a TypeScript config that lets you build anything.Cool. My first thought was that this should be an extension, rather than a separate browser. Of course that's covered in TFA, modern extensions are just not allowed to have the necessary access.I get the "oh no security" arguments about letting random shit from Chrome Web Store have free reign over the browser, but what if I trust the extension publisher and am willing to assume responsibility for my own actions, data, and computer?
